output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(YEAR(?date) AS ?year) WHERE {
  ?edition wdt:P1545 wd:Q752138 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1807 ?winner .
  ?winner wdt:P27 wd:Q30 .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
